root.speaker: Elder Lyren
root.text: The charter still stands, and I still stand by it. We do not have spare shelter to send people to, so the first real building here has to be an inn: a roof, a hearth, and a door that stays open to travelers and to our own kin when the road is long. When you are ready to stake it, say so.

choices.text: I'm in. Let's raise the inn.
The inn is still on my list. I wanted to check in.
The inn is finished. Corin should have what he needs.
You mentioned wanting a house of your own.
I put your name on the shelf. You should hear it from me first.
Your house is not done yet, but I am on it.
You wanted to talk about the town hall.
The town hall build is still underway.
The town hall is up.
I'll leave you to it.

quest_accepted.speaker: Elder Lyren
quest_accepted.text: Good. Place the inn plot with your staff, pay the materials the sign lists, and finish the build. When the roof is on and the hearth is in, come tell me yourself. I will be waiting on word.

choices.text: I'll start as soon as I can.

remind_inn.speaker: Elder Lyren
remind_inn.text: When the roof holds and the hearth is lit, come back and tell me in person. I am not rushing you, but I am not leaving until this town has a proper inn for anyone who needs a bed.

choices.text: I'll come back when it is ready.

inn_done.speaker: Elder Lyren
inn_done.text: There. A real inn for people who would otherwise sleep rough. Corin has the key. Go introduce yourself by the hearth. You earned more than thanks, but thanks is where I will start.

choices.text: Happy to help.

lyren_house_offer.speaker: Elder Lyren
lyren_house_offer.text: The charter gave us rules for the town. It did not give me a bed. I want the same small house anyone else gets. Craft the house token at your planning desk, stake the plot with your staff, pay the sign, then put my name on the management shelf inside when it is built. I will not forget who made room for me.

choices.text: I'll handle it.
I cannot commit to that yet.

lyren_house_accepted.speaker: Elder Lyren
lyren_house_accepted.text: When the walls are up, use the management block and set me as resident. Then come find me. I want to hear you say it, not read it off a shelf.

choices.text: You will get both.

lyren_house_remind.speaker: Elder Lyren
lyren_house_remind.text: Take the time you need. When the house is done, register me on the block, then come find me so we can finish this face to face.

choices.text: I'll come when it is done.

lyren_house_finish.speaker: Elder Lyren
lyren_house_finish.text: Then it is settled. I have a home under the same rules as everyone else. Thank you for seeing it through.

choices.text: Welcome home, Lyren.

town_hall_offer.speaker: Elder Lyren
town_hall_offer.text: We have homes. Next we need a town hall that belongs to all of us: a shelf for the charter, a desk for plans, a chest for shared funds. Stake the plot, pay what the sign asks, and we finally have a place to meet as a whole town.

choices.text: I'll put the hall up.
Not yet.

town_hall_accepted.speaker: Elder Lyren
town_hall_accepted.text: Use the town hall token with your staff, pay the materials, and build it out. When the hall is finished, tell me in person. I want to see your face when you say it is done.

choices.text: I'll tell you the moment it is finished.

town_hall_remind.speaker: Elder Lyren
town_hall_remind.text: Stone and paperwork both take time. When the hall is finished, tell me. I will be here.

choices.text: Still working on it.

town_hall_done.speaker: Elder Lyren
town_hall_done.text: There. Aetherhaven has a proper town hall: records, treasury, and a room where we can meet without yelling across the square. That is what I needed from you.

choices.text: Glad it helps.
server.aetherhaven.reputation.reward.continue
server.aetherhaven.reputation.reward.continue
server.aetherhaven.reputation.reward.continue
